title: GrimArmorHud
description:
GrimArmorHUD is a highly customizable HUD mod that allows you to see the durability of your armor in real time, no matter what type of armor you are wearing. It also displays durability for your shield, mace, axe, and sword.

The mod is very customizable,
body:
GrimArmorHUD is a highly customizable HUD mod that allows you to see the durability of your armor in real time, no matter what type of armor you are wearing. It also displays durability for your shield, mace, axe, and sword.

The mod is very customizable, allowing you to adjust almost everything in the HUD to fit your preferences.

The mod will continue to be updated with more features in the future.
Currently, it is available only for Fabric.  For support https://discord.gg/UE8nwGbYwt
